plan: Contact customer support (via chat, phone, or account portal) and verify identity as Isabella Lopez with email isabella.lopez3271@example.com.
Ask the representative to look up the current balance on the gift card associated with the account.
Ask the representative to pull up the most recent order and confirm which credit card was used — Visa, Mastercard, or Amex.
Ask whether the gift card balance can be retroactively applied to that recent order.
If yes, request that the gift card balance be applied to the order and confirm the updated total.
If no, request a payment method change for the order to the Visa card (since the other two cards carry high balances).
